ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin design */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the pin */,
  "slot_size" REAL /* Size of the slot in the pin */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the pin */,
  "surface_coating" TEXT /* Type of surface coating on the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of pin (e.g., coated, uncoated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin design */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin design was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin design was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_surface_coating FOREIGN KEY ("surface_coating") REFERENCES surface_coatings ("coating_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_pin_type FOREIGN KEY ("pin_type") REFERENCES pin_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the test (e.g., nl Transferred) */,
  "cv_percent" REAL /* Coefficient of variation (CV) of the test result */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test performed (e.g., performance, durability) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the test */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surface_coatings" (
  "coating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surface coating */,
  "coating_name" TEXT /* Name of the surface coating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surface coating */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the surface coating */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the surface coating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pin */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test the result belongs to */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Name of the parameter measured (e.g., nl Transferred) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin version */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_versions_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)
